channel.title: Everyday on Kraft Masonry
channel.description: Recent content in Everyday on Kraft Masonry

item.title: On Keeping a Paper Notebook in 2026
item.description: My phone has seventeen note-taking apps installed. I use none of them. I use a gridded A5 notebook and a fountain pen that cost eleven euros and has been refilled so many times the barrel is permanently stained with blue-black ink.

item.title: The 20-Minute Rule for Side Projects
item.description: I have started and abandoned more side projects than I care to count. The pattern was always the same: enthusiasm, a burst of progress, a missed week, guilt, abandonment. The 20-minute rule broke the cycle.
